raw:
{
  "judge_id": "judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The output identifies the load-bearing concept (theoretical foundations of debate), shows where the draft drifts from it (overreach in claims about being first and most enduring), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "The output walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency (assumptions of conditional independence and bounded disagreement), and proposes minimal repairs (explicitly stating assumptions).",
    "RX.1": "The output marks uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (the 'first' claim and the 'most enduring contribution' claim).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the 'strictly reduces' claim could be softened to 'reduces under stated assumptions').",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The output identifies the load-bearing concept (theoretical foundations of debate), shows where the draft drifts from it (overreach in claims about being first and most enduring), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: The output walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency (assumptions of conditional independence and bounded disagreement), and proposes minimal repairs (explicitly stating assumptions).
rationale.RX.1: The output marks uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (the 'first' claim and the 'most enduring contribution' claim).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the 'strictly reduces' claim could be softened to 'reduces under stated assumptions').
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
